title: ClickUp vs Smartsheet
description: Compare ClickUp vs Smartsheet in July 20. We analyzed features, pricing, user ratings, and real-world performance to help you choose the right project management tool.
verdict: After thorough evaluation, ClickUp emerges as our recommendation for most users with a 4.4/5 rating compared to 4.3/5. However, the best choice depends on your specific needs. We recommend evaluating both tools against your requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, ClickUp or Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Based on our detailed comparison, ClickUp edges ahead with a 4.4/5 rating. ClickUp excels at Replaces separate PM, docs, whiteboard, and goal tools, while Smartsheet is stronger for Spreadsheet-based work management platform for enterprises..

faqs.question: What are the main differences between ClickUp and Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: ClickUp and Smartsheet differ in pricing (Free–$19/user/mo vs $7-25/mo), target audience, and feature focus. Our comparison table breaks down these differences.

faqs.question: Is ClickUp cheaper than Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: ClickUp starts at Free–$19/user/mo while Smartsheet starts at $7-25/mo. Consider total cost of ownership including implementation and training.

faqs.question: Which tool has better features, ClickUp or Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Both platforms offer strong features for project management. ClickUp scores higher overall, but specific feature needs may favor one over the other.

faqs.question: Can I use ClickUp and Smartsheet together?
faqs.answer: Many organizations use both tools for complementary purposes. However, for overlapping use cases, choosing one streamlines workflows.

faqs.question: Which is easier to use, ClickUp or Smartsheet?
faqs.answer: Both ClickUp and Smartsheet prioritize user experience. The best choice depends on your team's technical expertise and workflow preferences.

faqs.question: Which platform has better customer support?
faqs.answer: Both offer documentation and support tiers. The quality varies by plan level — check our detailed review for support comparisons.

faqs.question: Which project management tool is best for my team size?
faqs.answer: Enterprise features favor Smartsheet for large teams, while ClickUp may be more suitable for smaller teams with its Free–$19/user/mo pricing.
